title: cicercula cicera
intro: Cicercula cicera, also known as Cicuta virosa, is a flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a purgative, emetic, and diaphoretic. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, indigestion, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of stimulating digestion and relieving congestion. Cicercula cicera can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
